ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the article belongs to */,
  "tag_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of tags assigned to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the comment has received */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for replies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "permission_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the vote belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was cast */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IP address was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agents" (
  "user_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user agent */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user agent was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the user agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_agents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new comment, new vote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was submitted */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who raised the flag */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag (e.g., spam, harassment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flag was raised */,
  "flag_status" TEXT /* Status of the flag (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, moderator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., edit_comments, delete_articles) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was assigned */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was assigned */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was assigned */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_categories_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_featured" (
  "featured_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each featured article */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being featured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("featured_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_featured_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_popular" (
  "popular_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popular article */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being popular */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popular_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_popular_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_edits" (
  "edit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edit */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being edited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the edit */,
  "edit_text" TEXT /* Text of the edit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the edit was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_edits_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_edits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bans" (
  "ban_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ban */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being banned */,
  "ban_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ban */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ban was issued */,
  "ban_expiration" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ban expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ban_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
